name: dCOMP
redeem: dCOMP is a 1:1 wrapper around COMP. Holders can unwrap dCOMP back into COMP onchain via the contract withdraw function. Minting/wrapping is restricted to whitelisted depositors, but the contract source states withdrawals are not restricted by that whitelist.
notes: Transparent wrapper structure with clear 1:1 backing to COMP. Main caveats are owner-controlled depositor whitelist and delegated COMP voting power managed by the wrapper.

sources.label: API3 dCOMP deposit and unwrap guide
